song.title: Vision of Grace
song.lyrics: [V1] .D Bm G A D Be Thou my vision, O Lord of my heart; .A G A Naught be all else to me save that Thou art. .Bm D D/F# G A Thou my best thought by day or by night, .Bm F#m G A D Waking or sleeping Thy presence my light. . D D7 G D Bm E A A7 Amazing grace how sweet the sound that saved a wretch like me; . D D7 G D Bm A G D I once was lost but now I'm found, was blind but now I see.
